# Third-party mobile rendering assets

- `marked.umd.js` and `marked.LICENSE.txt`: Marked 18.0.4, MIT License.
- `highlight.min.js`, `delphi.min.js`, `github.min.css`, `github-dark.min.css`: copied from the desktop app's vendored highlight.js assets.
- `katex.min.js`, `katex.inline.css`: copied from the desktop app's vendored KaTeX assets.
- `mermaid.min.js`: copied from the desktop app's vendored Mermaid asset.
- `preview-enhance.js`: copied from the desktop app's shared enhancement code.
